title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Ambrane - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Ambrane - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Ambrane! We are hiring a Digital Marketing Manager for our Howrah team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Ambrane:
Ambrane is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Data Analytics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ambrane!
